title: Built a grid trading bot. 12 days, €500 testnet, +€181.39 profit (36% ROI).
author: CurrentPop7909
selftext:
Now testing on 6 crypto pairs to see which scales. The interesting part isn't  
the code—it's the AI optimization layer that learns what works and doubles  
down.

In 4 weeks, either I'll have validated a 30%+ ROI strategy worth scaling, or  
I'll have learned exactly why it doesn't work. Either way, data > hope.

Curious if other bootstrapped founders are running side experiments like this.  
What's your validation playbook?

comments.author: Dipluz
comments.body: Well I believe most of us don't use the testnet at the major exchanges. We run forwardtest test on the main exchange endpoint so we get the real prices / volume / orderbooks etc. But hey a 30% roi on a testnet you should absolutely do a forward test on the real exchange.
